summary: Iteration 31: Complete testing of Phases B, C, D. Backend: 16/16 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features working - Gantt page loads with toolbar, reservation bars, detail panel with approve/reject buttons for 'requested' status. Command Center loads with map and assets sidebar. External Omniyat API slow/timeout causing KPI skeleton loading state.

integration_issues.issue: KPI cards show skeleton loading state due to slow/timeout external Omniyat API
integration_issues.note: Local MongoDB-backed features (reservations, gantt, approvals, today-summary) work correctly

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/reservations/gantt?days=14 returns 200 with correct structure
Backend: Gantt response has assets, range_start, range_end, total_reservations
Backend: Assets grouped correctly with asset_id, asset_name, reservations list
Backend: Days parameter works for 7, 14, 30 days
Backend: POST /api/reservations/{id}/approve changes status to 'confirmed'
Backend: POST /api/reservations/{id}/reject changes status to 'rejected'
Backend: Approve/reject non-existent returns 404
Backend: GET /api/reservations/today-summary returns 200 with KPI fields
Backend: Today-summary has active_count, upcoming_count, overdue_count, pending_count, alert_count
Backend: Today-summary includes detail lists (active, upcoming, overdue, pending)
Backend: GET /api/reservations/kpis returns 200 with correct structure
Backend: Gantt shows requested reservations
Backend: Approval updates Gantt status
Backend: pending_count matches requested reservations count
Frontend: Gantt page loads with toolbar (search, status filter, zoom, days selector)
Frontend: Gantt shows 12+ asset rows with colored reservation bars
Frontend: Search filter works (filters assets by name)
Frontend: Status filter works (filters by reservation status)
Frontend: Clicking reservation bar opens detail panel
Frontend: Detail panel shows reservation info (user, dates, status, site, project)
Frontend: Detail panel shows 'Demandé' status badge for requested reservations
Frontend: Approve button visible for 'requested' reservations
Frontend: Reject button visible for 'requested' reservations
Frontend: Clicking Approve button changes status to 'confirmed'
Frontend: Command Center page loads with map
Frontend: Command Center has assets sidebar with search and filters
critical_code_review_comments: PremiumGantt.jsx: Clean implementation with proper state management, toolbar controls, and approval flow
EnterpriseCommand.jsx: Well-structured Command Center with map, assets sidebar, KPIs from today-summary
Backend routes correctly ordered: /api/reservations/gantt and /api/reservations/today-summary before /{reservation_id}
Approval/reject endpoints properly update status and create logs
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed reservations for approval testing: TEST_ApprovalFinal, TEST_UIApproval, TEST_GanttAsset, TEST_ApprovalAsset, TEST_RejectAsset
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 31 tested Phases B, C, D. Phase B (Gantt): /reservation/gantt page with toolbar, asset rows, reservation bars, detail panel. Phase C (Approval): Approve/Reject buttons in detail panel for 'requested' status, POST /api/reservations/{id}/approve and /reject endpoints. Phase D (KPIs): GET /api/reservations/today-summary returns active_count, upcoming_count, overdue_count, pending_count, alert_count. Command Center at /command/center shows KPIs in topbar. External Omniyat API may be slow causing skeleton loading. All data-testid attributes: gantt-page, gantt-search, gantt-status-filter, gantt-days, gantt-row-{i}, gantt-bar-{i}-{j}, gantt-detail, approval-actions, approve-btn, reject-btn, enterprise-command, enterprise-topbar, topbar-kpis, kpi-{i}.

phase_b_gantt.details: Gantt page loads with 12+ assets, colored reservation bars, toolbar with search/filter/zoom/days, detail panel on click

phase_c_approval.details: Approve/Reject buttons visible for 'requested' status, clicking Approve changes status to 'confirmed', clicking Reject changes to 'rejected'

phase_d_kpis.details: GET /api/reservations/today-summary returns active_count, upcoming_count, overdue_count, pending_count, alert_count. Command Center shows KPIs in topbar (may show skeleton if external API slow)
